# markkët

> Open-source ecommerce platform for artists, collectives, and communities

markkët lets creators launch beautiful storefronts, sell products and event tickets, publish articles, and manage subscribers — without expensive platforms or vendor lock-in. Built for weird internet people, crafters, musicians, and small communities who want to own their infrastructure and long-term roadmap.

## Platform

- [markkët](https://markket.place): Main platform homepage
- [Stores](https://markket.place/stores): Browse creator storefronts
- [Blog](https://markket.place/blog): Updates, launch notes, and community stories

## For Creators

- [Dashboard](https://markket.place/tienda): Manage your store, products, events, articles, and subscribers
- [Selling](https://markket.place/sell): Information about selling in markketplace
- [Sign up](https://markket.place/auth): Create an account and launch your store

## Technical

- Built with Next.js (App Router), Strapi v5, Stripe, and SendGrid
- Open source: https://github.com/calimania/markketplace-next
- REST API via Strapi; Stripe Connect for payouts; SendGrid for transactional email
- Self-hostable; data owned by the creator

## Optional

- [Sitemap](https://markket.place/sitemap.xml)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/calimania/markketplace-next)
- [Club Calima](https://caliman.org/)
